text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear that Mejiro Ardan has something to discuss
with me, but when she comes to my office...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As you are aware, Trainer, the situation with my
leg keeps me from adopting the trial-and-error
approach utilized by others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such, I wish for you to select only the most
opportune times for me to run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Of course, when you deem it necessary for me to
enter a race, I will run with all I have. Please
choose wisely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan won't show it, but I can tell she's
exhausted. Revising her race schedule might be a
good idea.
